title: Gomesa brieniana

Within the Orchidaceae family, Gomesa brieniana is further classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cymbidieae. The genus Gomesa is a group of terrestrial orchids, and Gomesa brieniana is one of the species within this genus. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Gomesa brieniana.
